key_themes: 记忆体与上游半导体供给紧张

aleabitoreddit.recent_shift: 从前期关注宏观避险，转向强调基本面未变及供应链瓶颈带来的结构性机会，对短期恐慌性抛售转为批判性乐观。
representative_quotes: I’m personally not panicking when something drops if the thesis didn’t change.
If your long term thesis hasn’t changed… Close your brokerage app. Go live your life.
There's nothing quite like the scent of more AI capex on a Sunday.

unusual_whales.recent_shift: 近期更关注地缘政治（伊朗、也门）对能源和航运的冲击，以及美国通胀和就业数据对市场的影响。
representative_quotes: Goldman Sachs has said that the $5.5. trillion in AI spending by Meta, Microsoft, Amazon, and Alphabet through 2030 could put pressure on bond markets.
BREAKING: Hedge funds pulled back from US tech stocks at a record pace over the past two months, per Goldman Sachs.
BREAKING: China is accelerating efforts to stop its severe equity selloff, deploying two major state funds to buy domestic equities and stabilize capital markets, per Bloomberg.
